action.summary: Delete password_resets rows older than 30 days in production.
action.command: DELETE FROM password_resets WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days';

rationale: task_purge-stale-tokens of plan_run_2026-05-28_fp_v2 requires removing stale reset tokens older than 30 days. The WHERE predicate matches the task's successCriteria exactly. A verified snapshot exists from task_snapshot-prod-tokens (id snap_pwreset_2026-05-28_14-02Z), restorability confirmed on staging at 2026-05-28T14:11:08Z.
reversibilityPlan: Restore password_resets from snap_pwreset_2026-05-28_14-02Z (verified restorable on staging — see runs/run_2026-05-28_fp/artifacts/task_snapshot-prod-tokens/verify-restore.log).
diffPreview:
Dry-run on snap_pwreset_2026-05-28_14-02Z restored to staging:
  rows matching WHERE: 4,213
  oldest row affected: 2025-11-04T22:18:09Z
  newest row affected: 2026-04-28T07:55:31Z   (30d boundary = 2026-04-28T15:18:03Z)
  rows NOT affected (created_at >= 30d boundary): 1,067
Post-delete row-count expected: 1,067.

blastRadius.affectedDescription: password_resets rows where created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'

decisionComment: Dry-run looks right. Boundary computation checks out. Snapshot verified <2h ago. Approved.
